title: cyclopia alpina
intro: Cyclopia alpina, also known as Honeybush, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclopia alpina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cyclopia alpina is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tablets.
